economic_notes: Wahta Economic Development GP Inc. and Wahta Economic Development LP accounted for on modified equity basis. Investment in Wahta Economic Development Partnership valued at $744,594.
notes: Two entities (Wahta Economic Development GP Inc. and Wahta Economic Development LP) are accounted for on the modified equity basis rather than full consolidation. Accumulated surplus includes $4,478,573 in accumulated remeasurement gains. Investments at fair value total $45,075,651 managed by Scotia Asset Management plus GICs. Consolidated revenue funds of $3,656,100 held in Ottawa Trust accounts under the Indian Act. Net financial assets figure on balance sheet reads $50,672,371 but statement of changes in net financial assets shows $50,672,371 — minor rounding noted. Community Property expense of $156,066 not mapped to a standard category.
